title: Digital AP US History resources for teachers: DBQ packets, lesson plans, and primary source sets.
announcement: New for Spring 2026: Complete Labor History Unit bundle including Triangle Shirtwaist, Pullman Strike, and Lawrence Mill primary sources. Free shipping on digital downloads!
sale_message: Thank you for your purchase! Resources are instantly downloadable as PDFs. Please reach out at apushresourcevault@gmail.com with any questions.
policy_welcome: All materials are created by an active AP US History teacher with 7+ years of classroom experience. Aligned to the College Board APUSH framework.
policy_payment: PayPal and all major credit cards accepted. Digital items are non-refundable once downloaded.
policy_shipping: Digital items download instantly. Physical items ship USPS Priority from Dorchester, MA 02124 within 2 business days.
policy_refunds: Digital downloads are final sale. Physical items may be returned within 14 days unused in original packaging.
